mano_cua.result_summary: disableKeypress配置在directive模式下失效：设置disableKeypress=true后，directive模式输入框仍可键盘输入文字(test456被成功输入)；而component模式下相同配置正常工作(键盘输入被阻止)
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This conclusively confirms the bug. At the top of the page: The first input field shows 'test456' - the text was successfully entered despite disableKeypress = true. 'Disable keyboard on input (disableKeypress):' shows 'Disabled ● Enabled ○' - the 'Disabled' radio button IS selected, meaning disableKeypress = true IS configured. Despite disableKeypress = true, the keyboard input was NOT blocked in the directive mode! This is a functional bug in the Day Picker directive mode where the disableKeypress configuration fails to prevent keyboard input.
